title: PersistBlock
description: Typed persist block returned by write-capable agents for project memory updates. Agents never write project files directly — they emit a validated persist block and the orchestrator applies it. Allowed target paths are constrained so a block can be applied without path-traversal or arbitrary-write risk.

oneOf.description: Architecture Decision Record. The orchestrator appends it to the project's decision log (e.g. .agent-context/decisions.json).

context.description: Situation and why this decision was needed

oneOf.description: Append content to a project memory file. The target path is restricted to the memory/ or docs/ subtree and to .md/.json files; path traversal (..) and dotfiles are rejected by the pattern.

type.description: Append content to a project memory file

file.description: Relative target path under memory/ or docs/, ending in .md or .json. Examples: memory/lessons.md, docs/architecture/notes.md. Path segments are limited to [A-Za-z0-9_-]; .. traversal and absolute paths are not allowed.

content.description: Content to append to the memory file
